label: Marquee
summary: Scrolling text at one of three sane speeds; pauses on hover and focus, stands still under reduced motion.
era: The <marquee> tag Internet Explorer 2.0 shipped in 1995, welcome banners crawling across a million homepages.

classes.name: rs-marquee
classes.role: the scrolling viewport; pauses on hover and focus-within

classes.name: rs-marquee__content
classes.role: the moving track (the enhancer clones it for a seamless loop)

a11y: The text lives once in the DOM and reads in order; the enhancer's duplicate track is aria-hidden. Under prefers-reduced-motion it renders as static, fully-wrapped text and the pause button disappears (nothing to pause).
